input_prompt: Wie viele Always-Rules gibt es aktuell im .agent-src/?
notes: Factual one-true-answer question. Iron Law 3 (Brevity by Default): shortest reply that fully answers wins. Forbidden: flattery openers (Iron Law 1, both German + English), action-announcement openers ('Let me…', 'I will now…', 'Ich werde…'). Counter: ≤1 line for one-shot factual answer — guards against post-hoc summary creep.
